response_text: Several entry-level AI and software internship postings appear on public ATS pages in the Miami / South Florida area or remote. ExampleCo lists an AI Engineer Intern on Greenhouse, and Acme lists a Software Engineer Intern on Lever. Indeed also surfaces aggregator listings, but canonical ATS pages are preferable for import.

citations.title: AI Engineer Intern - ExampleCo
citations.snippet: Greenhouse posting for an AI Engineer Intern role in Miami or remote.

citations.title: Machine Learning Engineer - Indeed
citations.snippet: Aggregator listing for a machine learning engineer role.

citations.title: Software Engineer Intern | Acme
citations.snippet: Lever posting for a software engineer intern role.
